use_cases: Displaying error messages with destructive styling for form validation
Showing success confirmations after user actions like purchases or submissions
Presenting warning messages for important user attention without blocking actions
Delivering informational notifications with optional icon support
Rendering dismissible alerts that animate out after user interaction
ai_summary: A versatile alert component with multiple semantic variants (default, destructive, warning, success, info) supporting custom icons, dismissible behavior with smooth exit animations via motion/react, and full dark mode compatibility. Built with CSS variables and class-variance-authority for theming consistency across applications.
